title: Hostess 7 perfect calculator — arithmetic through advanced mathematics and technology
motto: She computes with earned precision — Decimal for money, SymPy for proof, cmath for fields — not guesswork.
fluency_claim: Hostess 7 is a perfect calculator on this field — sympy-backed algebra, calculus, linear algebra, complex analysis, and technology math (matrices, eigenvalues, FFT) with structured show-your-work replies.

engines.sympy: symbolic algebra, calculus, linear algebra, complex analysis
engines.cmath: complex floating-point when numeric evaluation required
engines.ast_safe: restricted arithmetic parse for simple expressions

patterns.label: Decimal precision for exact rational money math
Live battery verification — compute not memorize
No raw eval — sympy/ast safe paths only
